title: Report Payload Response Schema
description: Response schema for GET /api/v1/experiment-runs/runs/{run_id}/report-payload. This route returns a bare jsonify(payload) (not wrapped in the success envelope). The payload is generated by ExperimentReportService.generate_report_payload and carries a canonical report_id + schema_version + provenance header. The route also sets X-Report-Data-Hash and X-Report-Schema-Version response headers.

report_id.description: Unique identifier for this report payload instance

schema_version.description: Version of the report payload schema (e.g. '1.0')

data_hash.description: Hash of the underlying data used to generate this report (also returned in X-Report-Data-Hash header)

run_id.description: ID of the experiment run this report covers

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this payload was generated

aggregated_results.description: Per-configuration aggregate results. Report consumers should use config_label/config_hash/config_params as the trial identity; model is retained only as a legacy compatibility field and may be 'unknown'.

raw_example_results.description: Per-example, per-configuration metric rows. Raw prompt/input/output content is intentionally excluded.

insights.description: Rule-derived report insights, including winner/tradeoff summaries and example-level review flags such as example_anti_correlated, high_variance_example, and example_uninformative.

config_params.description: Redacted, client-safe configuration knobs for the trial. Raw prompts, messages, expected answers, responses, credentials, and long/multiline strings are excluded.

model.description: Legacy model identifier. Consumers should prefer config_label because this can be 'unknown' when the optimized knobs are not model fields.

config_label.description: Human-readable, redacted configuration label derived from safe knob values.

config_hash.description: Deterministic hash of the redacted configuration params.

example_id.description: Stable safe example reference; raw example content is not included.
